V1.name: Fundamentals Trajectory
V1.rationale: 8x revenue growth in 4yr (EUR 107M→EUR 854-944M guide). Fleet 4→12 vessels. Mgmt alignment: BW Altor 28% accumulating; covenants structurally limit misallocation; track record flawless × 5 periods. Capped at 4 by margin normalization (68.5%→49-54%), 2028 soft spot, and T-class capital discipline question.

V2.name: Valuation Mismatch
V2.rationale: 6.6x forward EV/EBITDA (~5x on full-fleet FY2027). Margin-adjusted: 0.128x/pt vs DEME 0.200x. But 14 Buy / 4 Hold consensus = partially recognized. Valuation anomaly real but smaller than originally claimed (was erroneously stated as 4-5x).

V3.name: Mispricing Reason
V3.rationale: Category mislabeling (offshore contractor vs infrastructure toll-road), leverage optics, listing fragmentation, constrained free float. Identifiable but verifying temporariness requires dividend initiation (2027) to force re-categorization. Weakest pillar per debate session.

V4.name: Downside Protection
V4.rationale: Pre-mortem: Hornsea 3 execution (15-20%), 2028 rate compression (20-25%), multiple cancellations (10-15%), mandate reversal (5%), covenant breach (<5%), T-class misallocation (15-20%). Termination fees proved (EUR 120M Hornsea 4). Soft asset floor (EUR 3.4B assets, replacement cost EUR 4-5B+). Leverage (EUR 1.3B net debt) amplifies all scenarios.

V5.name: Thesis Simplicity
V5.rationale: 2 conditions: (1) European offshore wind demand continues — HOLDING (North Sea Summit 15 GW/yr, UK AR7 record, CfD reforms); (2) Fleet scaling executes — HOLDING (10/12 delivered, every prior delivery on time/budget). Everything else is upside optionality.

V6.name: Upside Optionality
V6.rationale: 5 independent paths: (1) Dividend initiation 2027, (2) Multiple re-rating 6.6x→8-10x, (3) Day rates > 3% CAGR consensus, (4) Nexra/O&M to 30%+ of rev, (5) Asian market expansion (Taiwan contracted). Dividend and re-rating showing early evidence.

V7.name: Evidence Quality
V7.rationale: 5 audited 20-F filings (FY2020-FY2024) + 15 earnings transcripts + Perplexity deep research (31 Qs, independently sourced). Core thesis is [FACT]-based. 2 minor DATA GAPs: Hornsea 3 idle-time contract terms, 2028 trough depth quantification.

V8.name: Catalyst Clarity
V8.rationale: Dated: FY2025 20-F (Q2'26), H1 2026 results (Q3'26), Wind Ace delivery (Q3'26 — dividend unlock), dividend initiation (2027), Wind Apex (Q2'27 — FCF inflection). Minor timing uncertainty on dividend (board discretion).

rcChecklist.criterion: Latest annual filing (10-K/20-F) reviewed within 12 months
rcChecklist.evidence: run filing-review on a 10-K/20-F/10-Q within 12 months

rcChecklist.evidence: transcripts: 15 Sources Processed rows; 15 files in Transcripts/; 15 inline-cited

rcChecklist.criterion: debate-session run across all 6 pressure vectors
conviction-scoring + cross-model-validation council both complete; angels-advocate if band ≥ HIGH_CONVICTION
rcChecklist.evidence: run cross-model-validation + conviction-scoring (+ angels-advocate if HIGH_CONVICTION)
